summary: Testing iteration 32 - Generated tests for Perix social media app features: Friend Requests, Messages, Stories, and Contacts APIs. Backend tests: 27/28 passed. Frontend tests: Core flows and Messages specs created and tested.

integration_issues.issue: The Invite Friends button (data-testid='invite-friends-btn') is not visible in the current viewport. May need scrolling to access it.

issues: Missing translations for 'activities.haveInvitation', 'activities.enterInvitationCode', 'activities.join' - showing translation keys instead of translated text
Missing translation for 'profile.inviteFriends' - showing translation key instead of translated text

action_items: Add missing translations for activities page (activities.haveInvitation, activities.enterInvitationCode, activities.join)
Consider adding data-testid to View Public Profile button for better testability
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test user (test-user@test.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features are working. Backend APIs for friend requests, messages, contacts, and stories are functioning correctly. Frontend login and navigation work. Main issue found was EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in app.json pointing to production instead of preview - this was fixed. Missing translations on Activities and Profile pages should be addressed.
